home.description: Solving hard problems with clean code and thoughtful design.

about.paragraph1: With over 7 years of experience in frontend development, I have hands-on expertise ranging from e-commerce platforms to IoT embedded systems.
about.paragraph2: Specializing in Vue as my core framework, I focus on frontend architecture design, interactive development, and UI detail refinement to deliver highly customized digital products that balance stability and user experience.
about.paragraph3: In project execution, I emphasize cross-functional collaboration and development process management, aiming to transform complex requirements into intuitive and seamless product experiences.

experience.bxbDescription1: Led the development and maintenance of web-based operation systems for core products such as media processors and environmental control systems.
experience.bxbDescription2: Built a highly flexible drag-and-drop visual layout editor using Canvas and Fabric.js.
experience.bxbDescription3: Implemented real-time broadcasting features with Web Audio API and Opus.js audio encoding/decoding to address streaming system challenges.
experience.bxbDescription4: Provided technical guidance, conducted code reviews, optimized system architecture, and participated in product strategy planning.
experience.KSDDescription1: Developed and maintained the CityPass e-commerce platform using Vue and Nuxt with SSR architecture to improve performance and SEO.
experience.KSDDescription2: Integrated payment systems including Apple Pay and Google Pay, as well as various third-party social login services.
experience.KSDDescription3: Assisted in backend PHP API development and implemented LINE Bot webhook using Python Flask.
experience.YEPDescription1: Participated in the development of a G Suite educational application backend using jQuery for UI and data integration.
experience.YEPDescription2: Gained initial exposure to MVC architecture and built a strong foundation and interest in modern web engineering.
